title: Examples of questions clients come with
subtitle: Regression therapy helps find answers to various life questions and resolve deep-rooted problems.

questions.q1: Why do I keep attracting toxic relationships?
questions.q2: How can I overcome the fear of intimacy and trust?
questions.q3: Why can’t I find a partner for a serious relationship?

questions.q1: Where do my panic attacks come from?
questions.q2: How can I get rid of chronic anxiety?
questions.q3: Why do I constantly feel tired and exhausted?

questions.q2: Why can’t I realize my potential?
questions.q3: What are my hidden talents and abilities?

questions.q1: Why can’t I find a job that brings me satisfaction?
questions.q2: Where does my fear of success come from?
questions.q3: How can I overcome impostor syndrome?

questions.q1: Why do I keep repeating the same mistakes?
questions.q2: How can I find my path in life?
questions.q3: Why do I feel stuck in one place?

questions.q1: What is the psychological cause of my chronic illnesses?
questions.q2: How can I heal psychosomatic symptoms?
questions.q3: Why does my body react with stress to certain situations?

disclaimer: These are just a few examples. Regression therapy can help with many other issues and challenges.
